skills.why_used: User explicitly requested the full HackathonHunter workflow for the Pharos DoraHacks submission.
skills.evidence_summary: Loaded SKILL.md and G1-G4 references; created G1 evidence, G2 product slice, G3 visual contract, and G4 build plan.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Manual hackathon workflow with explicit blocker notes.

skills.why_used: HackathonHunter requires GPT Pro Deep research for concept selection and subsequent ideation/judging/spec decisions.
skills.evidence_summary: Deep research, three ideation windows, three judging windows, and best PRD/UIUX spec completed and saved under pitch/gpt-pro.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Gate would enter HUMAN_BLOCKED; no local substitute allowed for required strategic research.

skills.why_used: The user redirected P0 toward an installable OpenClaw skill; skill creation guidance was used for concise SKILL.md structure and bundled resources.
skills.evidence_summary: Created a concise ReplayFence SKILL.md with clear trigger, workflow, commands, output contract, and honesty rules.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Write a minimal OpenClaw SKILL.md using OpenClaw docs and local validation.

skills.why_used: HackathonHunter G3 requires installed gpt-taste for visual direction and hero/layout math before implementation.
skills.evidence_summary: Recorded a design_plan selecting an operational command-rail hero, state-machine triptych, proof capsule panel, and label/button checks.
skills.fallback_if_missing: G3 would block; do not replace with generic Tailwind taste.

skills.why_used: HackathonHunter G3 requires installed impeccable for register, palette, typography, layout, and anti-slop audit.
skills.evidence_summary: Ran context and palette scripts, created PRODUCT.md after NO_PRODUCT_MD, loaded product register, and recorded restrained product UI audit notes.
skills.fallback_if_missing: G3 would block or use a documented human blocker.

skills.why_used: PRD and G3 require a recognizable wordmark/logomark brand minimum.
skills.evidence_summary: Created a geometric latch/fence SVG brand pack with logomark, wordmark, mono mark, and OG PNG.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Use a simple text wordmark and record logo polish as a cut.

skills.why_used: Stack lock uses combined-pitch-demo mode with HyperFrames as the final video composer.
skills.evidence_summary: Loaded HyperFrames skill enough to record video composition constraints; actual video work remains blocked until product/runtime gates pass.
skills.fallback_if_missing: G6 video gate would block; do not substitute an unsupported composer.
